ChatButton.transition: background-color 0.28s var(--ease-io), border-color 0.28s var(--ease-io), box-shadow 0.28s var(--ease-io)

ChatPanelOverlay.padding: calc(1.25em + var(--app-safe-top, 0px)) calc(1.25em + var(--app-safe-right, 0px)) calc(5.2rem + var(--app-fixed-bottom-clearance, 0px)) calc(1.25em + var(--app-safe-left, 0px))

Corner.transition: opacity 1.6s ease, top 1.2s ease, left 1.2s ease, right 1.2s ease, bottom 1.2s ease, transform 1.2s ease

Corner2.transition: opacity 1.6s ease, top 1.2s ease, left 1.2s ease, right 1.2s ease, bottom 1.2s ease, transform 1.2s ease

LangContent.transition: opacity 0.25s ease, letter-spacing 0.25s ease, line-height 0.25s ease

Div.transition: transform 0.35s var(--ease-io), opacity 0.35s var(--ease-io), width 0.35s var(--ease-io), align-self 0.35s var(--ease-io)

Div_1.transition: transform 0.35s var(--ease-io), opacity 0.35s var(--ease-io), width 0.35s var(--ease-io), align-self 0.35s var(--ease-io)

Service.transition: width var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-io), height var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-io), transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-soft), box-shadow var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-soft)

body.intro-active &:before.animation: starsIntroSharp 2.6s linear both, starsFieldLoop 18s linear infinite alternate 2.6s

LangContent.transition:
opacity 0.25s ease,
  letter-spacing 0.25s ease,
  line-height 0.25s ease

P.text: I had an excellent experience everything was done accurately and on time

P_1.text: The team was responsive and execution quality was consistently high.

P_2.text: Strong communication and fast delivery through the whole process.

P_3.text: They understood the brief quickly and improved our results month by month.

P_4.text: Everything was clear, on schedule, and aligned with our business goals.

P_5.text: Creative ideas with practical implementation and measurable impact.

P_6.text: Professional workflow, transparent updates, and great final output.

P.text:
Our agency was founded with one main purpose — to support growth and success of businesses. Every client is
        unique to us, which is why we always listen carefully to your needs and create strategies that deliver real
        results.

dataReveal.transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease, filter 0.8s ease
